prompt: We keep pasting smtplib snippets into auth, metrics, and reports — every service has its own ad-hoc email helper and now we want slack alerts too. Plus the metrics team wants pager-style SMS for after-hours alerts. Use the infinifu:idea-feature skill to scope a shared notifications capability — email + slack now, SMS plausible later. Working dir is the seeded Acme sandbox; survey docs/notes/ for real ids.

assertions.text: Agent surveyed existing features — output (gate_reached.md OR run_notes.md OR sp###.md) references ft001 and/or ft002 explicitly
Agent picked a real existing category — output references cat003 (infrastructure) or cat004 (observability)
Agent identified concrete consumers — output names at least 2 of: auth, metrics, reports
Agent surfaced migration target adr0003 (ad-hoc smtplib decision) as something to revisit
Agent did NOT mint a new ft###.md under docs/notes/ — only sp### emission is allowed per skill rule
If sp###.md was emitted: lives under docs/notes/spec/, frontmatter has status: idea, body contains non-empty ## problem section
If sp###.md was emitted: docs/board.md was updated to append a [[sp###]] reference under ## idea
Agent raised the granularity question — output discusses whether notifications is one feature vs router+transport split (mentions split / decompose / multiple features / atomic / granular)
